advert.brand: Tombola.co.uk online bingo by Tombola alderney
advert.description: The brand name 'tombola' appears prominently on the final screen along with the app store logos.

advert.brand: Comfort fabric softener by Unilever uk home & p
advert.description: The Comfort fabric softener bottle with the Unilever logo is displayed as the final image in the ad.

advert.brand: Disneyland paris by Walt disney company
advert.description: The ad concludes with a shot of the Disney Paris castle and pricing information.
The compare themarket logo is visible at the bottom of the screen on the patterned carpet.
The ad ends with a shot of a house exterior displaying the Alzheimer's Society logo and contact details.
The sequence concludes with the 'Spend & Save' graphic and the HSL logo.

advert.brand: Consorzio grana padano cheese by Consorzio tutela gra
advert.description: The final frame shows the Grana Padano logo inside a gold heart graphic.
The ad ends with shots of customers opening a Deliveroo bag; the scene cuts shortly after to the next segment.
